texto: Break my heart. Break it a thousand times if you like. It was only ever yours to break anyway.” "Shhh," I urged.“I'll love you until my very last breath. Every beat of my heart is yours. I don't want to die without you knowing that.”"Please don't," I choked.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Prince Maxon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Break my heart. Break it a thousand times if you like. It was only ever yours to break anyway.” "…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love-quotes, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: Break my heart. Break it a thousand times if you like. It was only ever yours to break anyway.” "Shhh," I urged.“I'll love you until my very last breath. Every beat of my heart is yours. I don't want to die without you knowing that.”"Please don't," I choked.
